name: Autoload — quick lookup (PartKom + MParts)
description: Injects a 📋 button next to supplier order numbers (PartKom УАК… on b2b.part-kom.ru, MParts on v01.ru) and fetches the parts table via the autoload backend. Includes 'Добавить в очередь' + 'Принять все в 1С' for the collect-then-batch receipt flow shared with the /barcode/ web UI.
